title: earina autumnalis
intro: Earina autumnalis, also known as autumn earina, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Earina autumnalis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Earina autumnalis can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
